claims.claim: When both telemetry and sensory lanes are disconnected, bridge contact should not look merely silent; it should report a severed state.
claims.rationale: Existing `bridge_reciprocity_distinguishes_one_sided_states_and_last_sensory_send` covers both-lane disconnection as severed rather than attached silence.

claims.claim: Dynamic stale windows should not hide genuine lane drops under high entropy, but reflective silence should remain distinguishable before expiry.
claims.rationale: Existing reciprocity tests cover default stale after 61s, high-pressure stale windows, and high-entropy reflective silence expiry.

claims.claim: At the exact stale-window boundary, classification should be explicit rather than accidentally off-by-one.
claims.rationale: Source intentionally uses `age > stale_window_ms`; exact threshold remains recoverable and only ages beyond the window become stale or severed.
